## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Fixes #123). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (TDD — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `cargo +nightly fmt` run
- [ ] `cargo nextest run` passes (and `npm test` in `pwa/` if the web app changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` updated if this is user-visible
- [ ] Config UI parity kept if a `read-flow.toml` setting changed (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
